title: Controlled burns required
description: GEORGE NEWS - The public is advised that...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The public is advised that George Fire Services will be undertaking Control Burns in and around the Garden Route Dam over the next month, subject to weather conditions including wind direction to avoid smoke over residential areas.


> These control burns must however take place to ensure the reduction of the fuel load of cleared alien vegetation.


The public will be advised on the day of a Control Burn.

Fire Emergencies must be reported to 044 801 6311.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
